items.headline: How SpaceX and 'MANGOS' are fueling the latest ETF trends
items.summary: AllianceBernstein Global head of ETF strategy and partnerships, Julie Gunts, joins Yahoo Finance to explain how "MANGOS" stocks — Meta (META), Amazon (AMZN), Nvidia (NVDA), Alphabet (GOOG, GOOGL), OpenAI (OPAI.PVT), and SpaceX (SPCX) — are ushering in the latest trends in exchange-traded funds (ETFs).

items.headline: SpaceX extends historic rally, rockets to No. 4 by market value
items.summary: Yahoo Finance Markets & Data Editor Jared Blikre tracks SpaceX's (SPCX) historic rise following its IPO debut on Friday. The aerospace giant has been on a meteoric run, jumping to become the fourth-largest company in the world by market capitalization as investors pile into one of the market's most closely watched new listings.
items.why_it_matters: News impact is unclear; monitor price and volume reaction.

items.headline: Intel (INTC) Moves 18A P Into Risk Production As AI Partnerships Expand
items.summary: Intel (NasdaqGS:INTC) has moved its next-generation 18A-P manufacturing process into risk production. The 18A-P process is aimed at advanced AI and data center chips and is designed to be backward compatible for customers. Intel is working with Foxconn on AI infrastructure and with Kontron AG on early edge AI deployments. For investors watching Intel, the shift of 18A-P into risk production is a data point in the company’s attempt to build a foundry business alongside its existing processor...
items.why_it_matters: News may increase risk, valuation pressure, or negative sentiment.
